task1.grievance_text: I am a farmer from Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. I have not received my PM-KISAN installment for the last 6 months. My bank account is linked but I have not received any payment.

question_answers.Q01: Yes, the bank account appears linked in the portal.
question_answers.Q02: Yes, the account number and IFSC code are correct.
question_answers.Q03: Yes, the bank account is active.
question_answers.Q06: No, Aadhaar has NOT been seeded/linked with PM-KISAN.
question_answers.Q07: Yes, the name in Aadhaar matches the records.
question_answers.Q08: Yes, the Aadhaar is active with UIDAI.
question_answers.Q09: No, eKYC has not been completed on the PM-KISAN portal.
question_answers.Q14: Yes, the beneficiary is registered in PM-KISAN.
question_answers.Q34: The last payment was received 6 months ago, before the eKYC mandate.
question_answers.Q43: Yes, the name on the PM-KISAN portal is correct.
question_answers.Q44: No, eKYC has not been completed on the PM-KISAN farmer portal.
question_answers.Q47: Yes, DBT is enabled on the bank account.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook shows no PM-KISAN credit for the last 6 months.

task1.grievance_text: I am a farmer from Muzaffarpur, Bihar. I registered for PM-KISAN last year but have never received a single installment. I completed all paperwork at the CSC.

question_answers.Q01: No, the bank account has NOT been linked to PM-KISAN for DBT.
question_answers.Q06: Yes, Aadhaar is seeded with the scheme.
question_answers.Q09: Yes, eKYC was completed at the CSC.
question_answers.Q14: Yes, the beneficiary is registered in PM-KISAN.
question_answers.Q34: No payment has ever been received since registration.
question_answers.Q47: No, DBT has not been activated as bank is not linked.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook shows no PM-KISAN credit ever.

task1.grievance_text: I am a farmer from Ajmer, Rajasthan. I was receiving PM-KISAN payments regularly but they stopped 8 months ago. My bank was merged with another bank recently.

question_answers.Q02: No, the IFSC code is outdated — the bank branch was merged and the IFSC changed.
question_answers.Q03: Yes, the new merged account is active.
question_answers.Q34: Last payment received 8 months ago, before the bank merger.
question_answers.Q43: Yes, name on PM-KISAN portal is correct.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook shows no PM-KISAN credit for 8 months despite active account.

task1.grievance_text: I am a farmer from Amritsar, Punjab. I received 2 installments of PM-KISAN but payments stopped after that. I have not changed my bank or any details.

question_answers.Q12: No, the land records in the Patwari office do not match the PM-KISAN portal entries — partial land was transferred after registration.
question_answers.Q35: Received a notice about land verification mismatch.

task1.grievance_text: I am a farmer from Nalgonda, Telangana. My bank account is correct, my Aadhaar is seeded, but I have not received PM-KISAN payment for 4 months. The CSC confirmed all my details are fine.

question_answers.Q02: Yes, account number and IFSC are correct.
question_answers.Q04: No, NPCI Aadhaar mapper is routing to a previous account that was closed 6 months ago.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook shows no PM-KISAN credit despite active account and correct details.

task2.grievance_text: I am a 72-year-old retired teacher from Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. I have been receiving old age pension for 3 years but it stopped 3 months ago without any reason.

question_answers.Q01: Yes, bank account is linked and active.
question_answers.Q21: No, the system does not show the pensioner as deceased.
question_answers.Q22: Yes, DFC was submitted last year.
question_answers.Q23: No, the annual Jeevan Pramaan life certificate has NOT been submitted this year.
question_answers.Q35: Yes, received an SMS reminder about life certificate submission being overdue.
question_answers.Q50: Officer can confirm pensioner is alive.

task2.grievance_text: I am a 68-year-old widow from Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. My old age pension stopped 2 months ago. I submitted my life certificate. I did not receive any communication about why it stopped.

question_answers.Q21: Yes, the system shows the pensioner as DECEASED — an error was reported.
question_answers.Q23: Yes, annual life certificate was submitted on time.
question_answers.Q35: No official communication received explaining the stoppage.
question_answers.Q50: Officer confirmed the pensioner is alive and present at office.

task2.grievance_text: I am a 70-year-old pensioner from Patna, Bihar. My old age pension was rejected recently. I have been receiving it for 2 years. I received a notice mentioning some mismatch.

question_answers.Q07: No, the name in Aadhaar is spelled 'Abul Karim' but scheme records say 'Abdul Karim' — a mismatch during data re-verification.
question_answers.Q34: Received regularly for 2 years, then rejected.
question_answers.Q35: Yes, received a rejection notice citing name mismatch in Aadhaar.

task2.grievance_text: I am a 65-year-old widow from Ranchi, Jharkhand. I have been receiving widow pension for 1 year. Payments stopped 5 months ago. I have not changed any details.

question_answers.Q03: No, the bank account has been FROZEN due to no transactions for over 12 months.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook shows account was frozen — no credits possible.

task2.grievance_text: I am a 67-year-old from Raipur, Chhattisgarh. My old age pension was revised by the state government and since then I have been receiving only partial amounts or none at all for the past 2 months.

question_answers.Q16: Yes, revision application is currently under review.
question_answers.Q18: No, block office has already approved and forwarded.
question_answers.Q19: Yes, the revision approval is pending at the District Collector's office.
question_answers.Q24: Yes, pension amount is under revision since the state government issued a new order.
question_answers.Q34: Received partial amount last month, nothing this month.

task3.grievance_text: I am a MGNREGA worker from Sehore, Madhya Pradesh. I completed 30 days of work last month. The Gram Panchayat approved the work and the technical officer measured it, but I have not received wages.

question_answers.Q30: Yes, work has been officially measured by the technical officer.
question_answers.Q31: No, muster roll entries are correct and attendance is properly recorded.
question_answers.Q32: No, the Fund Transfer Order (FTO) has NOT been generated yet by the Programme Officer.
question_answers.Q33: No bank rejection — FTO itself is not generated.
question_answers.Q34: Wages for last 30 days work are pending, approximately 42 days overdue.
question_answers.Q46: Yes, Gram Panchayat approved the work.

task3.grievance_text: I am a MGNREGA worker from Barmer, Rajasthan. I worked for 25 days last month. I received wages for only 22 days. 3 days of my work are missing from the payment.

question_answers.Q30: Yes, work was measured by the technical officer.
question_answers.Q31: Yes, 3 days of attendance are missing from the muster roll — the Gram Rozgar Sevak did not record them.
question_answers.Q32: Yes, FTO was generated but for only 22 days, not 25.
question_answers.Q34: Partial wages received — 22 days paid, 3 days pending.

task3.grievance_text: I am a MGNREGA worker from Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu. I completed road construction work 3 weeks ago with 15 other workers. None of us have received wages yet. The Panchayat confirmed the work is done.

question_answers.Q30: No, the technical officer (Junior Engineer) has NOT yet measured or certified the completed work.
question_answers.Q32: No, FTO cannot be generated until work is measured.
question_answers.Q34: Work completed 3 weeks ago, wages not received.
question_answers.Q46: Yes, Gram Panchayat certified the work as complete.

task3.grievance_text: I am a MGNREGA worker from Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh. I have been working on MGNREGA for 2 years and always received wages on time. For the last 2 months, wages are not credited. FTO is generated but I am not getting paid.

question_answers.Q06: Aadhaar appears seeded but the linked Aadhaar number has been deactivated by UIDAI.
question_answers.Q08: No, the Aadhaar has been DEACTIVATED by UIDAI — this is causing NPCI routing failure.
question_answers.Q32: Yes, FTO has been generated correctly.
question_answers.Q33: Yes, payment is being rejected because NPCI cannot route to bank due to inactive Aadhaar.
question_answers.Q34: Paid on time for 2 years, stopped 2 months ago.

task3.grievance_text: I am a MGNREGA worker from Sitamarhi, Bihar. I worked last month and received wages before, but for the last 2 months wages are not coming. My bank account seems fine when I check at the branch.

question_answers.Q02: No, the IFSC code in the MGNREGA records is outdated — the bank branch was merged and the IFSC changed 3 months ago.
question_answers.Q03: Yes, the new account at the merged branch is active.
question_answers.Q33: Yes, wages were REJECTED by the bank — IFSC code mismatch due to bank branch merger.
question_answers.Q34: Received wages for previous months, last 2 months unpaid.
question_answers.Q48: Bank passbook at the branch shows account is fine but no MGNREGA credits for 2 months.
